# Gravityzone Tools

## Overview

gSage AI — GravityZone Endpoints tool.

## Tools in this group

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `gz_endpoints` | Query GravityZone network inventory for endpoint details, managed devices, and installation info | `gravityzone:read` | — | — |
| `gz_management` | Execute write operations in GravityZone: isolate/restore endpoints, update blocklist entries | `gravityzone:write` | ✓ | — |
| `gz_security` | Read GravityZone security posture data: endpoint blocklist and PHASR policy recommendations | `gravityzone:read` | — | — |

## Configuration

> The JSON below goes into the **configtool model** in the web UI (per organisation; can also be scoped to a department).

> **Sensitive fields** (api keys / passwords / tokens) are *omitted* from the JSON below — set them via environment variables (see the _Environment variables_ table) or directly in the encrypted DB row from the web UI.

### Empty configtool template (required fields only)

```json
{}
```

### Example configtool model

```json
{
  "base_url": "https://cloud.gravityzone.bitdefender.com/api"
}
```

### Field reference

| Field | Type | Required | Sensitive | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | :---: | :---: | --- | --- |
| `api_key` | `string` | — | ✓ | — | GravityZone API key (from Control Center → My Account → API keys). |
| `base_url` | `string` | — | — | `"https://cloud.gravityzone.bitdefender.com/api"` | GravityZone API base URL.  Default: https://cloud.gravityzone.bitdefender.com/api.  Override for on-premise deployments. |

## Environment variables

The variables below are derived automatically from each tool's `config_schema`. Set them in your `.env` (or via your secrets backend) to seed defaults for every organisation. **Per-org DB config takes precedence over env vars.**

| Variable | Maps to field | Type | Default | Sensitive | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
| `TOOL_GRAVITYZONE__API_KEY` | `api_key` | `string` | — | ✓ | GravityZone API key (from Control Center → My Account → API keys). |
| `TOOL_GRAVITYZONE__BASE_URL` | `base_url` | `string` | `"https://cloud.gravityzone.bitdefender.com/api"` | — | GravityZone API base URL.  Default: https://cloud.gravityzone.bitdefender.com/api.  Override for on-premise deployments. |

_Note: any field above can also be overridden per-tool by using the prefix `TOOL_<TOOL_NAME>__` instead of the shared `TOOL_<NAMESPACE>__` — useful when a single tool in the family needs a distinct value._

## Operations

### `gz_endpoints`

- **`list`** — paginate endpoints (supports filters, up to 1000/page via API v1.1)
- **`details`** — full record for one endpoint_id

### `gz_management`

- **`add_to_blocklist`** — add hash/path/connection rules (requires blocklist_type, rules)
- **`remove_from_blocklist`** — remove entries by ID (requires blocklist_item_ids)
- **`isolate_endpoint`** — isolate endpoint from network (requires endpoint_id)
- **`restore_isolation`** — restore isolated endpoint (requires endpoint_id)
- **`change_incident_status`** — update status (requires incident_type, incident_id, status)
- **`update_incident_note`** — add/update note (requires incident_type, incident_id, note)

### `gz_security`

- **`blocklist_items`** — list all blocklist entries (hash/path/connection)
- **`phasr_recommendations`** — PHASR recommendations for a company
- **`phasr_resources`** — behavioral profile resources for a company
- **`phasr_identities`** — behavioral profile identities for a company

## Permissions required

| Tool | Permissions |
| --- | --- |
| `gz_endpoints` | `gravityzone:read` |
| `gz_management` | `gravityzone:write` |
| `gz_security` | `gravityzone:read` |
